title: eleocharis neesii
intro: Eleocharis neesii, also known as Needle Spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Eleocharis neesii is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular treatment for colds and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
